case_title: PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK VS. BRIAN D KEETON et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT KEETON, BRIAN D DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-17-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-15-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-02-2003

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-05-2003 CONTINUED TO APR-09-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). MAR-05-2003 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
